case_title: CECELIA ELFENBEIN VS. HOLLY L GILES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-10-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $75.00 SERVED SEP-26-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GILES, HOLLY L
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED NOV-06-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GILES, HOLLY L

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE GOVERNMENT CLAIMS PROCEDURE BECAUSE SHE FAILED TO FILE A GOVERNMENT CLAIM PRIOR TO FILING A LAWSUIT IN SUPERIOR COURT (SMALL CLAIMS)", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ELFENBEIN, CECELIA AS TO DEFENDANT GILES, HOLLY L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
